mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT u.id) FROM u_user u WHERE u.is_deleted = 0
AND u.id = #{userId}
AND u.nickname LIKE CONCAT('%', #{nickname}, '%')
AND u.email LIKE CONCAT('%', #{email}, '%')

SELECT user_rank FROM ( SELECT user_id, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY SUM(amount) DESC) AS user_rank FROM u_user_coin_record WHERE direction = 1 AND biz_time >= CONCAT(#{month}, '-01') AND biz_time < DATE_ADD(CONCAT(#{month}, '-01'), INTERVAL 1 MONTH) AND is_deleted = 0 GROUP BY user_id ) r WHERE r.user_id = #{userId}

SELECT user_rank FROM ( SELECT user_id, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY SUM(amount) DESC) AS user_rank FROM u_leaderboard_income_submission WHERE audit_status = 1 AND period_month = #{month} AND is_deleted = 0 GROUP BY user_id ) r WHERE r.user_id = #{userId}
